project_and_enterprise_guide.overview: Comprehensive guide for ACE project structure, organization, and enterprise integration patterns. Covers project types, naming conventions, dependency management, and proven enterprise patterns for audit logging, error handling, file processing, and deployment.

project_types.type: Application Project - Deployable flows and ESQL
Library Project - Reusable subflows and modules
Shared Library - Static resources (JARs, XSDs, WSDLs)

enterprise_patterns.pattern: Error Handling - Centralized Error_SubFlow with email notification
File Processing - Dynamic naming with timestamps
Database Integration - Audit persistence, data lookup, polling
Deployment - BAR files with environment-specific overrides

project_and_enterprise_guide.note: This consolidated file provides a quick reference. For detailed implementation guidance, examples, templates, and best practices, please refer to: - Project structure examples in the codebase - Enterprise pattern implementations in existing flows - The ace-bob skill for artifact creation - Other consolidated instruction files in this directory
